title: misthoma #3410
definition:
1) the price for which anything is either let or hired
    1a) of a harlots hire
 2) that which is either let or hired for a price, as of a house,
    dwelling, lodging
nasbUsage:

 2) that which is either let or hired for a price, as of a house,
